authoritative_identity: raw_file_sha256 (byte-exact; matches the committed v2 H5AD_SHA). This is the ONLY current verified identity check.

canonical_content_sha256_archived_diagno.status: ARCHIVED Phase-1 diagnostic — NOT a current verified hash. Its canonicalization algorithm is not fully specified and was not independently reproduced this session; do not present it as verified merely because Phase-1 emitted it. The raw_file_sha256 is authoritative.

identity_check: raw_file_sha256 ONLY (byte-exact); NOT per-cell total equality, NOT the archived canonical
score_integrity_rule: compare emitted 5-decimal scores to independently-recomputed scores AFTER applying the frozen round-to-5-decimals rule; prefer EXACT equality after canonical rounding. If a tolerance is retained it must be INCLUSIVE: abs_error <= 5e-6.
storage: CSR float32; no layers; no raw counts layer

cp10k_reconstruction.role: archived SENSITIVITY only; never mixed with or equated to the primary median-normalized scores
cp10k_reconstruction.recipe: expm1(.X) -> per-cell L1 renormalize to target 1e4 -> log1p
cp10k_reconstruction.status: recipe finalized at the CP10k descriptive sensitivity (Task 7b)
